name: Cersia Beginner
author: Cersia

placementContext.reason: Cersia Beginner combines retro-inspired visuals with awkward, high-speed timings and dual segments that challenge even the most experienced top-list players.

description: A retro-inspired Top 10 contender created by Cersia and a talented team, featuring unique awkward gameplay and intricate dual sections that create a truly punishing experience.
